description: Explore the popular use cases of NFTs, including their role in Dapps for unique digital items and crypto collectibles, their market value, and their impact on online gaming economies.
topic_summary: NFTs serve as unique digital items and collectibles in Dapps, with a growing market despite volatility. They address challenges in online gaming by tokenizing assets, enabling ownership proof, and connecting gaming ecosystems [t=0:32-0:46].
